item.title: My craft: I design and make clothing for people with physical differences and disabilities.
item.description:
This delightfully Hobbity waistcoat is designed for people with fine motor impairments and digestive disorders. It looks like wool but it is a stretchy fleece and can be taken off over the head. It is sewn together at the buttonholes so that it moves and gives like it is actually buttoned closed. Because the vest is stretchy, it can change with your stomach needs over the course of the day. Did you know that some of us have stomach disorders that cause our waist sizes to change by 4 in in the course of just one hour? That can make it so that clothing that zips up becomes an agonizing prison very quickly. This skirt is a very twirly full circle skirt with a hidden placket in the back that allows you to adjust it to whatever your waist size is in the moment. This is great for people who have stomach cancer, ulcers, diverticulitis, ibs, and crohn's. It's also great for people recovering from eating disorders who need clothing that doesn't force them to check in with their weight everyday.
This is a shot of the back placket that allows for the adjustability. Different skirt through. This beauty is fully lined wool.
This is a full circle skirt and it features a different kind of adjustable back. The back is made with extra fabric that can be gathered into a bunch or pleats to give the effect of a Victorian walking skirt. Because I'm all about that drama.
This dress is made out of double brush knit which is one of the softest fabrics known to man. It has cute little puff sleeves, but it's also nice and stretchy so that it can move with your stomach, and is very gentle on the sensory needs. It's also a pullover, making it ideal for people with fine motor difficulties.
I started designing clothing for my stomach disorder out of necessity. I started doing it professionally when I realized how many people could benefit from adaptive clothing, but either had no idea it existed, or were turned off by how depressingly bland the options were. Why do the designers of adaptive clothing think that disabled people want to dress like boring white people in Olive garden commercials? We want personality, verve, expression!
Each item is made to your custom measurements. Are you at 6'5 and you've never actually had a floor-length skirt touch the floor? I can help. Are you 4 ft 6 and never had a maxi dress that didn't try to swallow you whole? I've got you. This dress is a pullover and made out of sensory friendly flannel. It's great for people with stomach difficulties because it is cut in the swing style, so you can belt it for a fitted look or wear it loose for maximum comfort. Belted styles are also great for people recovering from eating disorders because you just pull it on, tie your belt and go.
Overalls are the most comfortable clothing on Earth and I don't understand why we don't all wear them all the time.
This is my pinafore apron worn over one of the other dresses. Because everything I make has to have massive pockets.
This pinafore dress is my favorite cottage core look. It is very comfortable with its adjustable waistband in the back and flat waistband in the front and oh so cute. I specifically designed cottage core, goblin core, and dark academia clothing so that people with disabilities can have exciting options. If you like what you see, feel free to follow me on Facebook and Instagram @eightfoldfox and check out my website at www.eightfoldfox.com.
item.dc:creator: EightfoldFox

item.title: Just ugh.
item.description: So I've been having a really nice time getting to know this young lady, and things seemed to be going quite well. But then the word policing began... I said "things are kinda crazy at work." Apparently, crazy is a bad word because it's offensive to the neurodivergent, and I'm not allowed to use it regardless of the context having nothing to do with it being used as a slight against anyone. I said "I appreciate a partner who is intelligent and capable." Apparently, capable is a bad word because it's offensive to the disabled, and I'm not allowed to use it regardless of the context having nothing to do with it being used as a slight against anyone. There were more like this, and it just got to the point where it's so exhausting trying to police completely innocent words that I just can't be fucking bothered dealing with this person. I understand that certain words can be harmful, and I try my best to be considerate and thoughtful, but for fucks sakes, relax, lady. Yeesh. * Update, since so many folks were asking for one. I tried to reach out and talk to her about it this morning and it turns out she has me muted and blocked on the app where we met, as well as texts. Not very satisfying for y'all I know, but there's nothing much I can do about it.
item.dc:creator: HomeDepotAisle15

item.title: $200 for a service call to fix my dishwasher? I think NOT.
item.description: Yesterday I put my dishwasher through a self-clean cycle & opened it to find the bottom was filled with water. Called around & turns out 1) repair-people *hate* fixing Bosch dishwashers & 2) the one place that *would* fix it wanted to charge $200 for it - I bought it used for less than that 3 years ago! My wife & I settled on buying a new one but I kept digging online because a new dishwasher is $$$ & then I pulled off the bottom panel & looked inside. I put the new part in my cart & pulled the old one free only to find the drain pump was jammed by butcher’s twine which must have been stuck in the bottom of a Tupperware or something. Cleaned the spindle & put it back in & it’s FIXED! For free! Very proud of myself!
item.dc:creator: StevenAlleyn

item.title: IMGUR NEEDS AN OPSEC BRIEF.
item.description: Do not post pics about troop movements, locations, dates, numbers of troops and equpt. PLEASE Russia and the enemy can look and see details in photos and conversations that put ukrainias and freedom fighters in danger. They can get geolocations, meta data, facial recognition, and info from photos that you may have never considered. Your pic alone might not be enough but the enemy has lots of info and can use your pic to solve a puzzle. You might think "sauce" on a cool pic or story is nice but so does the enemy. You might think a simple pic of a "tank" or group of guys without other info is harmless but the enemy can see other photos and comments and piece things together. ALSO IT DOESNT MATTER IF THE PIC IS OLD OR FROM ANOTHER SITE, ITS STILL SPREADING VALUABLE INFO THE ENEMY CAN FIND AND USE. DONT LET IMGUR HELP RUSSIA AND HURT OUR FORCES. Please stop helping Russia guys! Ask yourself before posting... could this help putin find/hunt/kill/or workaround ukrainian forces?
item.dc:creator: icutyouinyoursleep

item.title: “Damn turns out the fascists were fascists all along”￼
item.description:
https://www.wral.com/us-rep-madison-cawthorn-calls-zelensky-thug/20180199/
Sauce: https://www.reddit.com/r/politics/comments/tb2xx8/us_rep_madison_cawthorn_calls_ukrainian_president/i04s9fd/?utm_source=share&utm_medium=ios_app&utm_name=iossmf&c Edit: All links as mentioned by OP: Stolen valor: Source: https://politicalwire.com/2020/08/11/gop-candidate-was-rejected-from-naval-academy/ https://www.citizen-times.com/story/news/local/2020/08/12/madison-cawthorns-claim-naval-academy-creates-false-impression/3350634001/ Sexual assault: Source: https://www.buzzfeednews.com/article/addybaird/madison-cawthorn-sexual-misconduct-allegations-patrick White supremacy: Sources: https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/2020-election/republican-house-candidate-s-website-attacks-critic-going-work-non-n1244531 http://pages.vassar.edu/pharos/2018/06/15/spqr-and-white-nationalism/ Neo-nazi support: Source: https://www.huffingtonpost.ca/entry/north-carolina-gop-candidate-deletes-photos-hitler-retreat_n_5f32f340c5b6960c066d6972?ri18n=true Lying about Paralympics training: Source: https://www.towleroad.com/2021/01/madison-cawthorn-paralympics/ Lying about his career: Source (I know it’s the same as above, they cover both topics): https://www.towleroad.com/2021/01/madison-cawthorn-paralympics/ Lying about Harvard and Princeton: Source: https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/2021/02/27/making-madison-cawthorn-how-falsehoods-helped-propel-career-new-pro-trump-star-far-right/?tid=a_classic-iphone&no_nav=true Lying about his car accident: Source: https://www.huffingtonpost.ca/entry/madison-crowther-lies-wheelchair_n_603c5e83c5b6d7794ae01026 He misspells his own name (Not the most relevant point to expose his predatory behaviour and his racism, but this shit bag misspells his own name, twice, in his signature...) Source: https://www.dailydot.com/debug/madison-cawthorn-signature/ ​ Bringing weapons at school board meetings: Source: https://www.citizen-times.com/story/news/2021/10/08/republican-rep-madison-cawthorn-seen-weapon-western-carolina-university/6050253001/ Irresponsible firearm handling For someone so adamant to defend 2A: Source: https://www.businessinsider.com/rep-madison-cawthorn-tried-to-board-plane-with-gun-2021-7?op=1 In another incident, he was captured at a firing range doing all sorts of batshit crazy things you should NEVER do with a loaded weapon… check the whole thread on Twitter: https://mobile.twitter.com/patriottakes/status/1474467728425689089?s=20&t=KTNCnPbgQmJhIsjYLWIRXg Illegally brought a weapon in Congress He himself claims he was armed on Jan 6th 2021, which means he illegally brought a weapon on the grounds of the Capitol. https://www.huffpost.com/entry/gop-rep-madison-cawthorn-said-he-was-armed-with-gun-during-capitol-insurrection_n_5fff2597c5b691806c4ea2bc Federal ethics complaint: Complaint: https://bipartisanreport.com/2021/07/31/gop-goon-madison-cawthorn-hit-with-federal-ethics-complaint/ Apology letter (pic halfway down the article): https://nypost.com/2021/07/30/cawthorn-draws-ethics-complaint-after-altercation-with-mckinleys-staff/ Threats against political opponents: Source: https://www.huffpost.com/entry/madison-cawthorn-sexless-warning_n_6184e8c2e4b0ad6f58815715 Pro-Russian war propaganda in early March 2022: https://www.wral.com/us-rep-madison-cawthorn-calls-zelensky-thug/20180199/ Driving with a revoked license: Source: https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/congress/rep-madison-cawthorn-charged-driving-revoked-license-rcna19461 Inconsistencies in how he met his (ex) wife Madison, a strong defender of traditional family values, got married and divorced within 8 months. More importantly however, there are a lot of weird details about who this woman is, how they met, etc. At this point there’s no evidence proving she was a honeypot, but the story is worth investigating. TLDR; he was partying in Sweden when he met an Army guy who took him to St Petersburg to gamble, and then invited him to a fake cross-fit competition in Miami where he met his future ex-wife: https://news.yahoo.com/old-video-resurfaces-rep-madison-035733209.html Fighting a dead rotten tree (Video of him fighting a dead tree starts at 1:48) Source: https://youtu.be/pm4gpYwwaCA
item.dc:creator: MonStar1203

item.dc:creator: EzoDave

item.title: @OP Delivers! The worst customers i encountered as a customer service agent for a IT-company. (Part1)
item.description:
When you buy and register a domain, an e-mail containting a legal self declaration form is sent to your registered e-mail by default. This is to confirm that you are a real person with a real personal number and not just some fake bot that bought this domain in order to abuse it for phising/scamming purpouses. This customer called us a week after buying his domains and was absolutely livid that we we`re "sitting on our asses instead of registering his domains". This happened pretty much daily, and most customers take it well, but sometimes we get this one person that never checks his e-mail or spam folder after registering for a new service or website.
You usually have three options for paying for our services. Creditcard, invoice by e-mail or invoice by paper mail. The first two are free or charge, but if you want to get a physical paper sent to your mailbox, its going to cost you an extra 2$, this is something a customer is notified of several times when ordering their service. This person spent 2 hours on the phone with me, demanding that i give him my personal information (name and address) because he was going to take this case to the supreme court and he had already hired a lawyer. (which would cost him 100$ just for the lawyer to listen to his case). His invoice was 22$, of which 2$ was the invoice fee, and he blatantly refused to pay this for no other reason than "he didn`t ask for this". Needless to say, he ended up having to pay it anyway because he agreed to everything when he signed up for our services.
When a domain or server is registered, it`s connected to a single or multiple person`s personal information, and in order to access this information we have to be able to verify that you are indeed the person you claim to be. We would do this by sending out a code to your registered phone number and then ask you a security question. This person claimed to be a certain person, and when we said "Ok, im sending the confirmation code to your registered phone number right now", he absolutely lost it. Customer: "I don`t have time for that formal s**t right now, our servers are down and i need all of the credentials right now!!!" Me: I`m sorry sir, but i can`t provide you with such sensitive information without confirming that you are indeed one of the owners of this account. Customer: "I already told you my name, you can check the company register and you will find my name there so stop with the bulls**t and give me the credentials!! You are costing us money!!" Me: The company register is public information sir, anyone could`ve googled this information and called us pretending to be you. Do you perhaps have any idea who might be the contact person/owner of this account? If so, please contact them and have them contact us right away in order to add you to the access list! Customer: *inhales the power of a thousand suns* HOW THE HELL AM I SUPPOSED TO KNOW THAT!?? (This nearly blew my eardrums out). The customer then proceeded to rant and curse me out for another good minute before hanging up. about a half hour later, his boss calls us and asks why we can`t give him the information. Told her it was because of security measures and that we could add him to the list right away if she wanted to add him as a secure contact. 5 minutes later it was all done and all he had to do was to call us back. He called back and kept hanging up because i was the one picking up the phone, i guess he was ashamed of his little outburst. Colleague picked up his call and we fixed the matter in less than 10 minutes.
Our company was part of another smaller company a long time ago, and all of the servers had to be updated in order for our tech department to be able to perform maintenance on them in the future. This customer refused to do anything about it because "He liked it the way it is" (we get this a lot!). Told him that if he didn`t do it, his data would eventually get unable to access due to lack of updates on the server. We kept reminding him about this issue monthly for 9 months, until one day all of his servers eventually stopped functioning and he was unable to access any of his data. He then calls us one day with a blood pressure that could raise the wreck of titanic and demands that we access all of his servers and send him a backup file with all of his data. "Sir, we`ve been warning you of this scenario for close to a year now, and you have refused to take action. There is nothing we can do beyond this point. You would have to consult a third party in order to attempt to extract any data from your servers". This accumulated into a monologue about how we weren`t being specific about the issue and that he would be elligble to a refund for the last 7 years that he has been a customer along with various other ridiculous demands. Long story short, everything was our fault and he was going to sue us for all of the lost data. Good luck my friend, we saved every single phone call, e-mail and chat log where you were presented with the issue.
This happened quite often. Sometimes it was because the customer had forgotten to update their credit card information, and sometimes they had fallen on bad times and couldn`t afford to pay. Usually, a customer would call us and ask us for a delay due to their financial situation, and 10/10 times we would say yes because we are a independent company that can afford to be flexible with such matters. This customer however, was not a humble customer that had fallen on bad times. He openly admitted that he hadn`t paid his invoice because he had "better investment opportunities" that he had to prioritize in order to grow his company. When i told him that he would have to pay at least half of his current invoice in order for us to unlock his services, he completely lost his s**t and told us that we were costing him millions of dollars in revenue. I checked his domain and it turns out his "million dollar business" is a website linking to a instagram account with less than 400 followers that reposts celebrity images with TMZ style headlines. Needless to say, he ended up having to pay half of his invoice, but then another month went by without the other coming in and so his services was once again shut down. We continued this million dollar rodeo for 2 more months until he finally paid his total invoice of 90$.
When you buy a domain, you have the option to connect a website builder, wordpress, office365 etc to your domain. This customer called us 20 minutes before closing time and demanded that we checked every single domain with him as well as providing him with a complete list of all services connected. This is actually not uncommon in our line of work, and i had to do this with several customers, but 108 domains around 20 minutes before we close is simply impossible, this would take me at least 2 hours if i worked at full caffeine mode. Told him i would make it a priority case and send him a complete list at the earliest convenience, but he refused and demanded that i stayed overtime and went through everything with him. Ended up spending the last 20 minutes convincing him that we would get a lot more "accurate data" if he let me work on it on my own until the next day.
Customer called us, he had activated office365 for his domain. He was obviously struggling with the install and needed assistance. The problem is that he called us for a good 20 seconds of monologue saying: "What is this office365 crap!? Its asking me for a QR code and other useless stuff, i don`t have time for this!!! Fix it! I`ll call you back soon" *click* So the only information i have is his phone number and that he`s unable to install office365. I have not verified his personal information or his domain that the office365 is connected to, so there is absolutely nothing i can do until i get this information. I try to call him, but he hangs up the phone. 2 days later he calls us... "WHY HAVEN`T YOU FIXED OFFICE365 YET!???"... Me: We need more information, if you could please provide us wi..... Him: " I DON`T HAVE TIME FOR THAT, I NEED TO FIX IT NOOOOOOW!!!! I ALREADY TOLD YOU ITS THE USELESS OFFICE365 THAT IS THE PROBLEM!!! *click* This continued for about a week until one of his coworkers finally called us and resolved the issue. I wasn`t even mad about his one because i was 100% convinced that the original caller had mental issues and i am unable to get mad about people with such issues.
When you order a dedicated server, we send out a team to physically set up the server. This is included in the cost, but when you pay for it, you damn well have to pay for it. This customer had already agreed to the minimum 12 month subscription for all 4 of his servers, so a refund is simply not possible as its a binding agreement that he signed for. Needless to say, he was not happy.
This happened a lot. Customers have services connected to their companies, and they think we track every single company amongst our 20 000+ customers and automatically shut down their services when their companies go bankrupt or have been forfeited.
This happened more than once. Customers thinks that just because we are a IT company, we can do absolutely everything on demand for the customer, including having access to their e-mail accounts and write e-mails for them.
This customer had his company e-mails connected to a outlook account, which is not something we provide. His logic was that because his e-mail was listed on the domain he rented from us, we are responsible for maintaining his e-mail backup.
This was pretty much daily. Mostly older people with zero IT-knowledge or experience that expected us to do absolutely everything for them even though our only service was to assist them with adjusting their DNS settings, sub domains, e-mail redirects and invoices.
So this is a pretty common tactic used by scammers today. They would "mask" their e-mails in a way that makes it seem like the e-mail you`re getting is sent by someone you know, even if its not. This customer ran a online business and her e-mail was getting abused in such way. We had a e-mail security app that we offer for free in order to filter out such mails, but she blatantly refused to put it into use and demanded that i "Hacked them back and bankrupted them"... I spent more than an hour trying to explain the issue to her, but it just ended up with her leaving our service and migrating her domains to another company. That`s not going to help your e-mail issues at all though.....
This is actually the most fun part of the job. Some people who are new to the internet buy stuff or services online and don`t know how to contact the company, so they just google "web, help, return, item, store, clothes" and the search engine would most likely guide them to our company that has a similar name. I`ve had everything from people trying to return clothes, sex toys, tv subscriptions etc through our channel, and usually i fix the issue by asking who they are trying to contact and provide them with a link as well as some basic internett advice. This customer was having none of it and demanded that i contacted the company personally because she was not "a regular customer" and it was illegal for us to refuse her service because we were the first result that came up in her internet search.
In order to keep our services running smoothly, we have to run a scheduled maintenance every now and then, and we always give at least 2 weeks notice until doing so in order for our customers to make arrangements so that they can keep their business running as normal during these hours. Most customers appreciate the heads up and prepare for the downtime, but then you have this usual dipshit who claims to run a serious business, yet he never ever reads any of the e-mails from his domain/server/e-mail provider.
Common occurence, customer orders a bunch of domains, e-mails and servers because they had a flash of entrepreneurship one day and then decided to drop it the next day. This customer ordered a bunch of car domains and obviously wanted to start some car rental business, but no activity was registered for over a year and invoices was never paid. Her logic was that "she never used any of it, so it will be brand new for the next person who wants to use it anyway". I lost fifty braincells trying to comprehend that last sentence.
item.dc:creator: NorwegianGamer

item.title: Mental Health
item.description: US Suicide Prevention Call or text: 800-273-8255 or 988 More info or chat online: https://suicidepreventionlifeline.org/ American Foundation for Suicide Prevention Www.afsp.org Great information & resources regarding depression (has been really beneficial to me): https://thedepressionproject.com/ Anxiety and Depression Association of America: https://adaa.org/understanding-anxiety Informational post by @Eindride, @DrivebyPianist Imgur people to talk to, resources, etc : http://imgur.com/gallery/xZiVRmo Need a safe place to be open with your mental health? Join Discord, Need to talk: https://discord.gg/gWDbZCbErQ Wholesome Discord run by @ryanjoseph666 https://discord.gg/FUbc4r5zFk
item.dc:creator: Scrumptiousassumptions

item.title: Have a dump in these trying times
item.dc:creator: mylenrawr119

item.title: Collab
item.dc:creator: Tomboclaat
